case_title: TSANG LINDA VS PROMETHEUS MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA POTRERO COURT APTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY TSANG LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA POTRERO COURT APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA POTRERO COURT APTS
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO PROMETHEUS MGMT, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA POTRERO COURT APTS $310.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $348.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PROMETHEUS MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA POTRERO COURT APTS
